---
title: "\'Causes of the French Revolution\'"
---

## \'Causes of the French Revolution\'

**Author:** Elizabeth Missing Sewell
**Date:** 1877
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> ns 24 (November 1877) 403-414, and (December 1877) 519-30.

### Notes

See also [[person:1301]Elizabeth Sewell].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
